lessons.title: Who Are You? Users in Linux
lessons.description: Discover how Linux identifies you and why user accounts are the foundation of security.

lessons.title: Strength in Numbers: Groups
lessons.description: Learn how groups simplify permission management for teams and services.

lessons.title: Who Owns This? `chown` and `chgrp`
lessons.description: Take ownership of files and transfer them to other users and groups.

lessons.title: The Holy Trinity: r w x
lessons.description: Decode the cryptic permission string. Understand Read, Write, and Execute.

lessons.title: Changing Permissions: Symbolic Mode
lessons.description: Use letters and operators to modify permissions intuitively with `chmod`.

lessons.title: Changing Permissions: Octal Mode
lessons.description: Master the numeric shorthand that professionals use for speed and precision.

lessons.title: With Great Power: `sudo`
lessons.description: Temporarily borrow the power of root. The right way to administer a system.
